title: Record Management on Oracle
text: Record Management on Oracle Uniface can access and create tables with columns and constraints, indexes, and stored package specifications and stored package bodies. Uniface can also access views which have been defined in the application model. The limits imposed by Oracle on records, indexes, tables, and fields are shown in the table: Table 1. ORA Connector Limits What Maximum Comments Fields per record 254 fields Uniface only supports 253 fields in modifiable tables. Length of record 8KB A Uniface record (not including segmented fields) has a maximum of 8192 bytes. Note: The maximum record size for entities that have variable length fields is 8KB, the rest goes into the overflow table. For entities with only fixed length fields the maximum record size is 2GB-1. Fields per key 16 fields Number of indexes Unlimited Maximum length of key Unlimited A Uniface record has a maximum of 8192 bytes. Maximum length of a field Not applicable Dependent on the storage format. SQL statement length 64 KB Uniface has a maximum of 10 kilobytes, except for the Create Table facility.
